---
title: ""
---

<h1 class="site-title">EpiEvidence</h1>

<p class="site-tagline">
Advancing Health through Evidence, Empowering Research with Intelligence, Enabling Decisions through Research.
</p>

<div class="home-grid">

<div class="home-card">
<h2><a href="epidemiology.html">Epidemiology →</a></h2>
<p>Randomized control trials, real-world evidence, and methods.</p>
</div>

<div class="home-card">
<h2><a href="datascience.html">Data Science →</a></h2>
<p>Statistics, machine learning, artificial intelligence, and data visualization.</p>
</div>

<div class="home-card">
<h2><a href="insights.html">Insights →</a></h2>
<p>Short notes, paper commentaries, observations, and research reflections.</p>
</div>

<div class="home-card">
<h2><a href="publications.html">Publications →</a></h2>
<p>Research papers, preprints, and meeting abstracts.</p>
</div>

<div class="home-card">
<h2><a href="about.html">About →</a></h2>
<p>Mission, founder, disclaimer, and contact information.</p>
</div>

</div>
